mapper.sql: id, application_id, risk_level, risk_score, risk_tags_json, rule_hits_json, suggested_action, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fraud_risk_result (application_id, risk_level, risk_score, risk_tags_json, rule_hits_json, suggested_action, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{riskLevel}, #{riskScore}, #{riskTagsJson}, #{ruleHitsJson}, #{suggestedAction}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fraud_risk_result WHERE application_id=#{applicationId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
